summary: Investor Deck feature testing completed successfully. Backend: 8/8 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All 17 E2E tests passed - password gate renders with input/submit, correct password grants access, wrong password shows error, deck presentation with 10 slides (hero + 6 features + tech + market + contact), navigation arrows, slide counter (01/10), nav dots on right side, auto-play toggle, contact form submission with success message.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Password verification uses environment variable INVESTOR_DECK_PASSWORD with fallback default
Good: Contact form stores submissions in MongoDB investor_inquiries collection for record keeping
Good: Contact form also sends email via Resend integration (graceful fallback if email fails)

Good: All data-testid attributes properly placed for testing: password-gate, password-input, password-submit, password-error, investor-deck, autoplay-toggle, contact-form, contact-name, contact-email, contact-company, contact-message, contact-submit, contact-success
Good: Navigation supports keyboard arrows, scroll wheel, and on-screen buttons
Good: Auto-play advances every 6 seconds with toggle to pause/play
Good: Slide counter shows current/total (01/10 format)
Good: Nav dots on right side show labels on hover
Good: Feature slides have TM badge for trademarked features (AI Transaction Orchestrator, Biometric Passport)
Good: Contact form validates required fields (422 for missing fields)
seed_data_creation: Test contact form submissions created in investor_inquiries collection during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Investor Deck feature at /investor-deck fully working. Password gate protects access (NotaryChain2026!). 10 slides: 1 hero with platform stats, 6 feature slides (AI Orchestrator, Biometric Passport, Blockchain Sealing, Enterprise RBAC, Smart Templates, Real-Time Collaboration), tech stack slide with 4 categories, market opportunity slide with $18.6B market size, contact form. Auto-play advances every 6 seconds. Keyboard/scroll/button navigation works. Contact form submissions stored in MongoDB and sent via Resend email.
